about.label: Who We Are
about.title: We Treat Your Loved Ones Like Family
about.paragraph1: Swift Comfort Line helps seniors remain independent at home by providing reliable support with daily tasks, appointments, and companionship.
about.paragraph2: We serve Ottawa and surrounding areas with a focus on safety, comfort, and trust. Every visit is handled by the same dedicated person — someone your family can count on.
about.quote: Swift Comfort Line — Here when you need us, every single week.

ourServices.label: What We Offer
ourServices.title: Our Services
ourServices.subtitle: Simple, reliable support for seniors living at home

transportation.title: Transportation & Appointments
transportation.description: Safe and reliable rides to doctor visits, pharmacy trips, grocery stores, and other needs

homeSupport.title: Weekly Home Support
homeSupport.description: Help with light housekeeping, organizing, and everyday tasks

companionship.title: Companionship & Check-ins
companionship.description: Spending time with seniors, ensuring they are okay, and updating family if needed

packages.title: Our Plans
packages.subtitle: Flexible support that fits your schedule

serviceAreas.label: Where We Serve
serviceAreas.title: Proudly Serving Canada
serviceAreas.boundary: Reliable senior support services available across Canada.

1.text: Swift Comfort Line gave me the best experience ever! Booking was fast and seamless.
1.name: Oluwatobi Adebayo

2.text: Professional and top-notch service. I highly recommend them!
2.name: Mary Johnson

3.text: My mother is in great hands every week. Same person, always on time.
3.name: James Okoro

4.text: Excellent service from start to finish. The team was professional and punctual!
4.name: Sarah Williams

5.text: They take such good care of my father. He looks forward to every visit.
5.name: David Chen

6.text: Highly recommend Swift Comfort Line. Professional, efficient, and affordable!
6.name: Aisha Mohammed

7.text: Swift Comfort Line was a lifesaver. They took my mother to her hospital appointment and waited the entire time. So professional and caring!
7.name: Patricia Okonkwo

8.text: I use their service every week for my clinic visits. Reliable, always on time, and the companion service gives me so much peace of mind.
8.name: Robert Mensah

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: We'd love to hear from you
contact.subtitle: Call us or send a message — we'll get back to you quickly.

footer.description: Reliable senior support in Ottawa. Transportation, errands, and weekly home visits from a trusted companion.
footer.address: 1338 Wellington St West, Unit 10, Ottawa, Ontario, K1Y 3B7 Canada.
